superseded_reason: Direct command-stack repair removed bridge from implemented MES/inspection quantity write paths on 2026-05-31.
executive_decision: NO_GO for UOM runtime closure in this branch

blockers.title: Required governed commands are bridge-ready but live handlers can still bypass canonical UOM conversion
blockers.evidence: MdaUomAuthorityBridge maps required P46 commands to existing UOM services and probe converts ReceiveInventory 10 BOX to 500 PCS, but live domain handlers do not call the bridge yet.
blockers.repair: Wire each live domain command through MdaUomAuthorityBridge before mutation, then persist MEASVAL, audit/evidence, and outbox atomically.

blockers.title: Alias ambiguity is not fully quarantined on main
blockers.evidence: Main UomAliasResolutionService uses ORDER BY supplier_id NULLS LAST LIMIT 1 for matching aliases, so conflicting active alias rows can resolve silently.
blockers.repair: Query all active candidates; if more than one distinct canonical code exists, write uom_alias_quarantine and return a Problem Details response.

blockers.title: Conversion rule lifecycle vocabulary is inconsistent
blockers.evidence: ConversionRuleService resolves lifecycle_status='approved'; UomWorkflowService promotes lifecycle_status='active'; UomDataQualityScanner checks active.
blockers.repair: Define one runtime-active rule state or implement explicit compatibility mapping with migration and tests.

blockers.title: Active UOM branches own the files needed for safe repair
blockers.evidence: Remote UOM branches modify UomController, UOM services, UOM registries, UOM migrations 257-260, UOM UI, and UOM tests.
blockers.repair: Integrate the UOM branch first or cherry-pick only reviewed UOM fixes into a staging branch before P46 code remediation.

operational_simulations.expected: PO receipt 10 BOX converts to 500 PCS inventory quantity
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: ReceiveInventory can store raw supplier UOM without item policy conversion

operational_simulations.expected: Supplier alias 'in' conflict deterministically scopes or quarantines
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: Alias resolver may pick one matching alias via LIMIT 1
Factor-only temperature conversion produces incorrect values

operational_simulations.expected: Length value used as mass is blocked
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: Quantity kind mismatch can contaminate inventory/cost facts

operational_simulations.expected: Inspection micron result compares to mm spec with precision proof
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: Inspection specs can still persist free-text unit fields

operational_simulations.expected: Cost rollup uses purchase UOM and canonical cost/unit conversion
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: Finance cost quantities can drift from inventory units

operational_simulations.expected: Deprecated conversion rule is blocked or effectivity-resolved
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: Wrong lifecycle state can allow or reject valid conversions unpredictably

operational_simulations.expected: Missing item UOM policy blocks lot-controlled material issue
operational_simulations.failure_if_missing: MES issue can default to EA or target UOM
